summary: Completed testing of BIBI Cars CRM Quote History System. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% test success rate. Frontend testing partially completed due to VIN lookup service issues and browser stability problems.

ui_bugs.issue: VIN lookup service not returning results for test VIN 1HGBH41JXMN109186
Browser crashes during leads page navigation testing

integration_issues.flow: VIN to Quote to Scenario Selection
integration_issues.issue: Cannot test full flow due to VIN lookup service not working
Could not test Quote History modal due to navigation issues

passed_tests: Admin Login (201) - JWT token obtained successfully
Calculator Ports (200) - 4 ports and 4 vehicle types found
Calculator Calculate (201) - Monetization flow working (visible: $22489, internal: $23889)
Calculator Quote (201) - Quote created with scenarios
Quote Scenario Change (200) - Successfully changed from recommended to minimum to aggressive
Quotes by Lead (200) - API endpoint working
Quotes by VIN (200) - Found 6 quotes for test VIN with scenario pricing
Quote Audit History (200) - History tracking with 3 entries including scenario changes
Lead Quick Create (201) - Lead creation successful
Lead from Quote (201) - Quote to lead conversion working
Leads API (200) - 14 leads found with monetization metadata
Calculator Admin Profile (200) - Profile management working
Calculator Admin Stats (200) - 9 quotes, 1 profile tracked
Calculator Admin Routes (200) - 37 route rates, new rate creation working
Calculator Admin Auction Fees (200) - 10 auction fee rules, new rule creation working
VIN Check Page Load - Page loads correctly with proper UI elements
Admin Dashboard Load - Dashboard loads with correct navigation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix VIN lookup service - test VIN 1HGBH41JXMN109186 is not returning vehicle data, preventing full frontend Quote History System testing. Also investigate browser stability issues during admin navigation.

success_percentage.frontend: 40% (partial testing due to VIN service issues)
